description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Main Festival】Near Hanno Station North Exit・around Hanno Yasaka Shrine

• 15:00 – Five town floats (sukiぬき yatai) gather and line up in front of Hanno Yasaka Shrine; ceremonial music offered and shrine visit
• Evening – Floats parade and compete throughout the city streets
• 19:40 – Ten town floats compete on the main street (near festival headquarters)
• Both days feature food stalls and local product vendors

No dedicated parking available. Please use public transportation (traffic restrictions in effect at certain times and locations).

Inquiries: Okumushi Hanno Tourism Association, 042-980-5051
location: 飯能八坂神社周辺（飯能駅北口すぐ）
